mapper.insert: INSERT INTO custom_strategies (strategy_id, label, description, category, yaml_content, lifecycle_state, version, capabilities, source_strategy_id, validation_status, validation_errors, created_by, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{strategyId}, #{label}, #{description}, #{category}, #{yamlContent}, #{lifecycleState}, #{version}, #{capabilities}, #{sourceStrategyId}, #{validationStatus}, #{validationErrors}, #{createdBy}, #{note}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE custom_strategies SET label = #{label}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, yaml_content = #{yamlContent}, lifecycle_state = #{lifecycleState}, version = #{version}, capabilities = #{capabilities}, validation_status = #{validationStatus}, validation_errors = #{validationErrors}, last_validated_at = #{lastValidatedAt}, note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM custom_strategies ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM custom_strategies WHERE lifecycle_state = #{lifecycleState} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM custom_strategies WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO custom_strategy_versions (strategy_id, version, yaml_content, label, description, change_note, created_at) VALUES (#{strategyId}, #{version}, #{yamlContent}, #{label}, #{description}, #{changeNote}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT strategy_id AS strategyId, version, yaml_content AS yamlContent, label, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM custom_strategy_versions WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId} ORDER BY version DESC
